<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of Collision. * * (c) Nuno Maduro <enunomaduro@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace NunoMaduro\Collision\Adapters\Phpunit; use ReflectionObject; use Symfony\Component\Console\Application; use Symfony\Component\Console\Input\InputInterface; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\Output; /** * @internal */ final class ConfigureIO { /** * Configures both given input and output with * options from the environment. * * @throws \ReflectionException */ public static function of(InputInterface $input, Output $output): void { $application = new Application; $reflector = new ReflectionObject($application); $method = $reflector->getMethod('configureIO'); $method->invoke($application, $input, $output); } }
